Name of this species shown in GUI.comment: Just a comment for this JSON, not shown in GUI.
Name of this species shown in GUI.ionMechName: The ion mechanism name for this species (ending with '_ion'). Only 'na_ion' and 'k_ion' are defined in NEURON by default. All others are custom MOD- or HOC-based mechanisms.
Name of this species shown in GUI.baseOuterConc (mM): The base concentration outside the cell. It is used as a default value assigned to the GLOBAL var named '{species}o0_{species}_ion'.
Name of this species shown in GUI.Diff (um2/ms): The diffusion coefficient in the extracellular space. For outside-in diffusion, it is used only in 'point + on-off' and 'point + spike' models.
Name of this species shown in GUI.t_alpha (ms): The membrane uptake coefficient: the higher value, the slower uptake. For outside-in diffusion, it is used only in 'point + on-off' and 'point + spike' models.
Name of this species shown in GUI.uptakeReversalConc (mM): Used only for inside-out diffusion with uptake and defines the relaxation outer conc value which is targeted with the rate of 't_alpha (ms)'.
Name of this species shown in GUI.baseInnerConc (mM): Like the 'Outer' var, but inside the cell, and the GLOBAL var is named '{species}i0_{species}_ion' (currently not used in BrainCell).

commonParams.veryMinOuterConc (mM): The very min outer concentration for all the species such that we cap a value when it drops below this threshold. It applies to both outside-in and inside-out diffusion (except RxD diffusion module).

Warnings: 1. Any changes to this JSON file must be done synchronously with the changes to two MOD files: '_{OutsideIn/InsideOut}DiffHelper.mod'. The lists of species in these files must be identical (including the total number of species, their order and 'ionMechName').
2. Keep each 'baseOuterConc (mM)' and 'uptakeReversalConc (mM)' greater than or equal to 'veryMinOuterConc (mM)'.
3. Be cautious assigning a negative or zero value to 'veryMinOuterConc (mM)' because user may want to take a logarithm of the outer concentration.
